op.h: The top programmers fight for slots.
op.lede: No certification mill. No diplomas. Every operator is ranked by the jobs they shipped, the rating they earned, and the FLOW they paid back to the network. Only the best get live orders. The board refreshes every hour.
op.lb.title: Live leaderboard · top operators
op.lb.meta: Updated hourly · rank by jobs × rating × retention
op.pillar.p1.p: Submit a proof-of-work portfolio or a sample run on a live task. One successful delivery is worth a hundred paper certifications.
op.pillar.p2.p: New operators start in the unranked pool. Win orders, ship clean, keep rating above 4.80. Top 200 get priority matching.
op.pillar.p3.p: Blown deadlines, bad ratings and disputes cost you rank, matching priority and FLOW stake. Quality is enforced economically.
op.apply.label: Application window
op.apply.p: We open the board to new operators every Monday. Bring a GitHub, a shipped product, or a portfolio of runs — no resume, no interviews.
